3182990.name: Fulfillment Center Simulator
3182990.description:
Fulfillment Center Simulator puts you in charge of a small, scrappy warehouse fighting to grow into a fully optimized logistics hub. What starts as a rundown shack with limited tools quickly evolves into a fast-paced management challenge where every second counts, every order matters, and efficiency is the key to success. Take control of the day-to-day operations of your fulfillment center—receiving shipments, organizing inventory, preparing orders, and keeping your clients happy. As you master the workflow, you’ll expand your space, upgrade your equipment, and transform your operation from a humble startup into a streamlined, high-performance facility.

Run the Floor

Move, sort, and stack products using pallet jacks, pick carts, and forklifts to keep the flow moving smoothly. Upgrade your equipment as workloads increase and unlock faster, more powerful tools to improve your handling capabilities.

Master Real Logistics

From picking and packing to staging and shipping, every minute matters when you're shipping against the clock. Plan the most efficient routes, minimize downtime, and juggle multiple orders at once. The better you manage your space and time, the more profit and reputation you earn.

Inventory & Time Management

Your shelves, racks, and pallets won’t organize themselves. Use smart inventory management to track stock levels, prevent overflow, and avoid costly mistakes. Keep up with time-sensitive requests, manage busy rush periods, and stay ahead of incoming shipments before they back up your process.

Client Relations

Each client has expectations—and they’re paying attention. Deliver quickly and accurately to build trust and unlock more lucrative contracts. Fall behind and you risk losing business. Your reputation determines what opportunities you get next.

Expand Your Warehouse

As your operation grows, so must your facility. Reinforce the old shack, add new storage zones, expand loading bays, and eventually tear the whole building down to construct a modern, fully customized warehouse. Increase capacity, reorganize your layout, and optimize your workflow to meet rising demand.

Grow Your Product Line

Start with a modest catalog and gradually expand to handle a wider variety of goods. Larger items, fragile products, and bulk shipments will all test your ability to balance floor space, equipment, and efficiency.

A Fulfillment Experience

Whether you're neatly stacking a pyramid of boxes, handling an order surge, or racing the clock to meet deadlines, every moment captures the challenge and satisfaction of running a real fulfillment center. It’s a grounded, hands-on simulation built for players who love logistics, optimization, and watching their hard work pay off.
3182990.supported_languages:
英语*, 法语, 意大利语, 西班牙语 - 西班牙
*具有完全音频支持的语言

categories.description: 无需应对快速反应事件
